summary: A clip from a congressional hearing. A small inset at the lower left shows a witness seated at a hearing table, labeled MS. FOX. The main frame displays personal photographs presented during the testimony, including a selfie of two smiling women and a photo of a young man in a wheelchair with a head support being visited by a golden service dog in a vest in a clinical setting.

script.scene: A selfie of two smiling women is shown; an inset at lower left labels a hearing witness MS. FOX.
A photo shows a young man in a wheelchair being visited by a golden service dog in a vest.
Continued hearing footage with the witness inset.
